title: The Big Movie Awards Night: Oscars 2026
summary: The Oscars are a big awards show for movies, happening on Sunday night. It's a very exciting year because some awards are hard to predict. The movie 'One Battle After Another' might win the best picture award, but 'Sinners' is also a strong competitor with many nominations. Jessie Buckley is expected to win best actress for her role in 'Hamnet'. Other actors like Michael B Jordan and Timothée Chalamet are also in the running. The show will be on TV in the UK and US, starting at different times. Conan O'Brien is the host, and many famous stars will give out awards. People are watching to see which movies and actors win the golden statues.

the top award for the best movie of the year
when a movie or actor is chosen as a possible winner

questions.question: Which movie might win best picture?
Who is expected to win best actress?
Where can people in the UK watch the Oscars?
What do winners receive at the Oscars?

background_read: The Oscars, also called the Academy Awards, are a yearly event where movies and actors are honored with awards. It started in 1929 and is very popular around the world. People watch it on TV to see their favorite stars and find out which films win. The show includes performances, speeches, and lots of excitement. It's a fun way to celebrate great movies.
Article_Structure: WHO: Hollywood stars, actors like Jessie Buckley, and host Conan O'Brien
WHAT: The Oscars awards show with close races for best picture and acting awards
WHERE: Broadcast on TV in the UK (ITV) and US (ABC/Hulu)
WHY: To award the best movies and actors of the year and entertain viewers

perspectives.description: People are excited to see which movies and actors win awards, making it a fun event to watch.
